settings.text: Shades of You is not just a brand — it is a shared vision, built by two founders bound by friendship, ambition, and a relentless drive to create something meaningful.
Childhood school friends with a deep love for craft, commerce, and discipline — they came together with one goal: to build a brand that blends purpose with scale, heritage with modernity.

At the heart of SOY lies Batik — a rare wax-resist printing technique practiced by skilled karigars whose hands carry generations of knowledge. The founders see their role not as creators of this art, but as its custodians.

settings.title: The Craft First
settings.body: Every print is wax-resist batik, done by hand by skilled artisans. We don't treat craft as a marketing word. It is the reason we exist.

settings.title: Fabric That Breathes
settings.body: We use natural, organic fabrics — soft on the skin, good for the planet. Ethnic wear shouldn't feel stiff or synthetic.

settings.title: Made for Every Body
settings.body: We size from XXS to 6XL because luxury isn't conditional. Every woman deserves to wear something beautiful, exactly as she is.

settings.title: Slow, Not Fast
settings.body: SOY is not trend-led, not mass-produced, not fast fashion. It is slow luxury — built with intention, worn with ease.
